translations.en: I have to charge my phone.
translations.hi: मुझे अपना फोन चार्ज करना है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να φορτίσω το κινητό μου.
translations.ja: スマホを充電しなきゃ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st singular (V2); selects a bare infinitive and expresses obligation.
Possessive determiner agreeing with a neuter accusative singular noun (Handy); marks possession.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of the verb 'aufladen'.
Separable lexical verb in the bare infinitive; clause-final complement selected by the modal 'muss'.

translations.en: We want to load the boxes.
translations.es: Queremos cargar las cajas en la furgoneta.
translations.fr: Nous voulons charger les cartons dans la camionnette.
translations.it: Vogliamo caricare le scatole sul furgone.
translations.ru: Мы хотим загрузить коробки в фургон.
translations.pt: Queremos carregar as caixas na van.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים להעמיס את הארגזים על הטנדר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn chất những thùng lên xe.
translations.ar: نريد تحميل الصناديق على الشاحنة الصغيرة.
translations.nl: We willen de dozen in het busje laden.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо завантажити коробки в фургон.
translations.hu: Fel akarjuk pakolni a dobozokat a furgonra.
translations.hi: हम बक्सों को वैन में लोड करना चाहते हैं।
translations.el: Θέλουμε να φορτώσουμε τα κουτιά στο βαν.
translations.nb: Vi vil laste kassene inn i varebilen.
translations.id: Kami ingin memuat kotak-kotak ke dalam van.
translations.sv: Vi vill lasta lådorna in i skåpbilen.
translations.ro: Vrem să încărcăm cutiile în dubă.
translations.da: Vi vil læsse kasserne ind i varevognen.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st plural (V2); selects a bare infinitive and expresses volition.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner for 'Kisten'.
Common noun, plural, accusative; direct object of 'aufladen'.
Separable lexical verb in the bare infinitive; clause-final complement selected by the modal 'wollen'.

sentences.target: Du kannst dein E-Bike später aufladen.

translations.de: Du kannst dein E-Bike später aufladen.
translations.en: You can charge your e-bike later.
translations.es: Puedes cargar tu bicicleta eléctrica más tarde.
translations.fr: Tu peux recharger ton vélo électrique plus tard.
translations.it: Puoi ricaricare la bici elettrica più tardi.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以晚点再给电动自行车充电。
translations.yue: 你可以遲啲叉你部電動單車。
translations.ru: Ты можешь зарядить свой электровелосипед позже.
translations.pt: Você pode carregar sua bicicleta elétrica mais tarde.
translations.he: אתה יכול להטעין את האופניים החשמליים שלך אחר כך.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể sạc xe đạp điện sau.
translations.nl: Je kunt je e‑bike later opladen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш зарядити свій електровелосипед пізніше.
translations.hi: तुम अपनी ई‑बाइक बाद में चार्ज कर सकते हो।
translations.pl: Możesz naładować swój rower elektryczny później.
translations.el: Μπορείς να φορτίσεις το ηλεκτρικό σου ποδήλατο αργότερα.
translations.nb: Du kan lade elsykkelen din senere.
translations.id: Kamu bisa mengecas sepeda listrikmu nanti.
translations.ro: Poți să încarci bicicleta electrică mai târziu.
translations.da: Du kan oplade din elcykel senere.
translations.ja: 電動自転車の充電は後でいいよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd singular (V2); selects a bare infinitive and expresses ability/permission.
Possessive determiner agreeing with a neuter accusative singular noun (E-Bike); marks possession.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'aufladen'.
Temporal adverb (comparative form), modifies the VP; indicates time.
Separable lexical verb in the bare infinitive; clause-final complement selected by the modal 'kannst'.

sentences.target: Er wird den Akku gleich aufladen.

translations.de: Er wird den Akku gleich aufladen.
translations.en: He will charge the battery right away.
translations.es: Él va a cargar la batería enseguida.
translations.fr: Il va recharger la batterie tout de suite.
translations.zh-Hans: 他马上就会给电池充电。
translations.pt: Ele vai carregar a bateria agora mesmo.
translations.vi: Anh ấy sẽ sạc pin ngay.
translations.nl: Hij gaat de batterij meteen opladen.
translations.hi: वह अभी तुरंत बैटरी चार्ज करेगा।
translations.nb: Han skal lade batteriet med en gang.
translations.da: Han vil oplade batteriet med det samme.
translations.ja: 彼はすぐにバッテリーを充電する。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd singular (V2); forms a future-like periphrasis with a bare infinitive.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Akku'.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object of 'aufladen'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the VP to indicate imminence.
Separable lexical verb in the bare infinitive; clause-final complement selected by the auxiliary 'wird'.

Er wird den Akku gleich aufladen.
de: Du kannst dein E-Bike später aufladen.
Er wird den Akku gleich aufladen.
en: I have to charge my phone.
We want to load the boxes.
You can charge your e-bike later.
He will charge the battery right away.
